description_long: This humanoid robot features a smooth, rounded head with no visible mouth or nose, and two subtle, glowing eyes set into its face. Its torso is compact and slightly angular, with a central chest emblem and black accent panels that contrast with the predominantly white body. The arms are robust and cylindrical, with large forearms and articulated joints at the shoulders and elbows, suggesting a range of motion. The hands are not distinctly defined, blending into the forearms, and the legs are long and slightly flared at the base, giving the robot a stable stance. The back is streamlined, with no visible wiring or external attachments, and the overall design is minimalist and futuristic. The surface appears hard and smooth, with a glossy finish on the black sections and a matte look on the white areas.
description: A sleek, white and black humanoid robot with a rounded head, glowing eyes, robust arms, and long, flared legs. Its minimalist design features smooth surfaces and a futuristic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's glowing eyes, chest emblem, and symmetrical arm and leg positioning.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cylindrical arms, rounded head, and the smooth, continuous profile of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a streamlined back with no visible features or attachments, and the broad, stable stance of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm and leg contours and the seamless connection between torso and limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides and legs straight, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; the robot has integrated panels and coverings with a minimalist, futuristic style.
attribute_facial_features: The face is smooth and featureless except for two glowing eyes; no mouth, nose, or expressive elements are present.
attribute_limb_articulation: Visible articulation at the shoulders, elbows, and hips, likely using rotary or hinge joints; limbs appear rigid with no visible fingers or toes.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two eye-like sensors on the face; none visible elsewhere.
